content.text:
Read the plan file at /projects/myapp/docs/plans/2026-03-28-feature.md. Find the FIRST Task section that has uncompleted checkboxes.

CRITICAL CONSTRAINT: Complete ONE Task section per iteration.

When ALL tasks done, output: <<<RALPHEX:ALL_TASKS_DONE>>>
I'll read the plan file and work on the first uncompleted task.

Code review of: implementation of plan.

Path A - No issues: Output <<<RALPHEX:REVIEW_DONE>>>
